name: First Bad Version
description: You are a product manager. The latest version of your product fails the quality check. Since each version is based on the previous version, all versions after a bad version are also bad. Given n versions [1, 2, ..., n], find the first bad version. You are given an API isBadVersion(version) which returns whether version is bad. Minimize the number of API calls.
